description.zh: 三国时期，魏、蜀、吴三国鼎立，各自为政。魏国（曹魏）务实高效，继承汉制；蜀国（蜀汉）以仁义忠信为本，丞相诸葛亮鞠躬尽瘁；吴国（东吴）灵活多变，善于水战外交。三方竞争博弈，亦有联盟合作，是中国历史上最经典的多方博弈格局。
description.en: During the Three Kingdoms period, Wei, Shu, and Wu coexisted as rival states. Wei (Cao Wei) was pragmatic and efficient; Shu (Shu Han) upheld righteousness with Zhuge Liang's devoted service; Wu (Eastern Wu) was flexible and adept at diplomacy. The three competed yet sometimes allied—the most classic multi-party strategic dynamic in Chinese history.
